MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to September 20, 2013 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Sep-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan Cronin, Tel. 415.368.3753, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court did not adopt the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to September 10, 2013 to give plaintiff the opportunity to argue the matter. Clerk shall notify the moving party of the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

***After hearing, the parties have stipulated to a new hearing date of September 13, 2013 per defendant's email to the court.***
